ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "current_rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the player */,
  "highest_rating" INTEGER /* Highest rating ever achieved by the player */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., round-robin, Swiss, knockout) */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer who created the tournament */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for tournament registration */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date for tournament registration */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the tournament */,
  "is_registration_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tournament registration is currently open */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organizer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the organizer joined the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the organizer is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game is part of */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the game */,
  "board_number" INTEGER /* Board number where the game was played */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., +1, -1, =1) */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control for the game (e.g., classical, rapid, blitz) */,
  "is_rated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is rated and will affect the players' ratings */,
  "white_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player playing as white */,
  "black_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player playing as black */,
  "time_started" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "time_ended" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_white_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("white_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_black_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("black_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "old_rating" INTEGER /* Old rating of the player before the tournament */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the player during the tournament */,
  "new_rating" INTEGER /* New rating of the player after the tournament */,
  "highest_rating" INTEGER /* Highest rating achieved by the player during the tournament */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score of the player in the tournament */,
  "results" TEXT /* String representation of the results (e.g., +5 +2 +4 +6 =3) */,
  "number_of_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player in the tournament */,
  "number_of_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player in the tournament */,
  "number_of_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player in the tournament */,
  "number_of_draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the player in the tournament */,
  "best_move_rating" REAL /* Best move rating by the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_records_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the round is part of */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the round */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the round */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the round */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of players in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each board */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the board is part of */,
  "board_number" INTEGER /* Number of the board */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the board */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players that can play on the board simultaneously */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boards_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player1_result" TEXT /* Result for player 1 (e.g., +1, -1, =1) */,
  "player2_result" TEXT /* Result for player 2 (e.g., +1, -1, =1) */,
  "points_player1" REAL /* Points awarded to player 1 */,
  "points_player2" REAL /* Points awarded to player 2 */,
  "elo_change_player1" REAL /* Change in ELO rating for player 1 */,
  "elo_change_player2" REAL /* Change in ELO rating for player 2 */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., organizer, player, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_system_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a system default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., create_tournament, view_results) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_system_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a system default permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed (e.g., tournament_id, game_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was recorded */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament (if applicable) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., classical, rapid, blitz) */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is an official rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
